product_overview: Five low-risk, high-impact frontend changes that do not alter business logic and aim to improve SEO, social sharing, trust signals, loyalty visibility and product conversion. Each change is additive, low-complexity, and can be implemented and deployed independently within 2-4 hours total.
core_goals: Ensure site pages are indexable by search engines (meta robots)
Improve social link click-through by using a real OG image
Increase visitor trust and conversion with prominent trust badges
Surface the loyalty program to non-logged users and show points to logged users
Expose product review summary (stars + count) immediately under product title to increase conversions

features.name: Meta Robots Tag
features.description: Add a robots meta tag (INDEX, FOLLOW) to the global app layout so search engines reliably index pages.
user_flows: GET https://jaleca.com.br/ -> Receive 200 HTML -> GET https://jaleca.com.br/ (curl/inspect) -> HTML contains <meta name="robots" content="INDEX,FOLLOW"> (happy path)
GET https://jaleca.com.br/ -> Receive 200 HTML -> GET https://jaleca.com.br/ (curl/inspect) -> HTML does NOT contain meta robots tag (error: indexability not present)

features.name: OG Image as Real Photo
features.description: Provide a 1200x630 real-photo OG image at /og-home.jpg and reference it in layout metadata so social shares show an attractive lifestyle image instead of the logo.
user_flows: GET https://jaleca.com.br/og-home.jpg -> Receive 200 image/jpeg or image/webp with dimensions ~1200x630 -> GET https://jaleca.com.br/ -> HTML meta property og:image references https://jaleca.com.br/og-home.jpg (happy path)

GET https://jaleca.com.br/og-home.jpg -> Receive 404 Not Found OR Receive 200 image with wrong dimensions -> GET https://jaleca.com.br/ -> HTML og:image may reference missing/incorrect image (error path)

features.name: Trust Badges on Homepage
features.description: Add a visible TrustBadgeBar component below the header/AnnouncementBar that displays key trust messages (Compra 100% Segura | Frete Grátis >R$599 | Troca 30 dias | PIX 5% | 3x sem juros).
user_flows: GET https://jaleca.com.br/ -> Receive 200 HTML containing TrustBadgeBar markup with text 'Compra 100% Segura' and icons (happy path)
GET https://jaleca.com.br/ -> Receive 200 HTML WITHOUT TrustBadgeBar markup (error: trust bar not rendered or missing import)

features.name: Loyalty Visible (Club Jaleca)
features.description: Show a 'Club Jaleca' badge in the header to all visitors. For logged-in users fetch and display the user's points and estimated discount.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/profile with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 user object with id -> GET /api/loyalty?customerId={id} -> Receive 200 { points: number } -> UI displays '{points} pts' in header (happy path - logged in)
GET /api/auth/profile without session cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> UI displays static 'Club Jaleca' link that points to /minha-conta (happy path - not logged in)

GET /api/auth/profile with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 user object -> GET /api/loyalty?customerId={id} -> Receive 500 or network error -> UI falls back to header showing 'Club Jaleca' or masked points and logs error for debugging (error path)

features.name: Reviews Visible on Product Page
features.description: Display star rating summary and reviews count immediately under the product name (above price). Data is fetched from the product and reviews APIs; if no reviews exist, keep current behavior (reviews tab).
user_flows: GET /api/wc-product?slug={slug} -> Receive 200 Product object with id -> GET /api/reviews/{productId} -> Receive 200 array of reviews length>0 -> UI renders StarRating (avg) and 'X avaliações' below product title (happy path)

GET /api/wc-product?slug={slug} -> Receive 200 Product object with id -> GET /api/reviews/{productId} -> Receive 200 empty array -> UI does NOT render star summary below title and keeps reviews inside the 'Avaliações' tab (error / no-reviews path)

GET /api/wc-product?slug={slug} -> Receive 200 Product object -> GET /api/reviews/{productId} -> Receive 500 or timeout -> UI suppresses star summary and optionally shows 'Sem avaliações' or silent fallback, logging the error for monitoring (error path)

tech_stack.framework: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS v3.4

tech_stack.other: Cielo (PIX/Cartão/Boleto), Brevo email, Melhor Envio, Meta Pixel + CAPI, Google Analytics 4, ContentSquare

endpoints.description: Register new customer automatically from CPF lookup
Check if CPF exists in WooCommerce
Send password reset email via Brevo

response_schema.200: shipping options array with price and deadline

Get tracking status for an order

features.description: Product wishlist saved in localStorage and user account

features.description: Geolocation-based popup showing nearest physical store

endpoints.description: Get nearest franchise by IP geolocation

features.description: Product reviews fetched from Google Places and WooCommerce

features.description: Server-side Meta Conversion API and client Pixel tracking for add-to-cart, purchase

endpoints.description: Send add-to-cart event to Meta CAPI

features.name: Virtual Try-On
features.description: AI-powered virtual try-on for jaleco products

features.name: SEO Hub Pages
features.description: Static profession hub pages (medico, enfermeiro, dentista, etc.) for topical authority

known_limitations.issue: Cielo Boleto integration pending full webhook confirmation flow
known_limitations.impact: Boleto payments may not auto-confirm without manual check

known_limitations.issue: Blog AI generation depends on Gemini API quota
known_limitations.impact: Blog generation may fail during quota exhaustion
